ksa_text: Knowledge of data quality testing frameworks and methodologies, including unit testing for data transformations, integration testing across data pipelines, regression testing for data integrity, and quality assurance approaches for production datasets.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("pipelines?", "data quality", "unit test"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4104); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 2 job-posting-level and 1 certification-level matches (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Competency appears regularly in DE role descriptions and/or certification curricula.
